media_processing_validation_error: Fix the media processing rules before saving.
media_processing_editor_desc: Enable the processors you want, bind extensions when needed, and let the AsterDrive built-in pipeline handle the final fallback when it is enabled.
media_processing_editor_validation_title: Media processing config has validation issues
media_processing_editor_processor_enable: Controls whether this processor participates in thumbnail generation. Disabling it keeps the current settings for later reuse.
media_processing_editor_processor_extens: Only matching files will be routed into this processor.
media_processing_editor_processor_builti: AsterDrive built-in renderer. It does not need extension bindings, and it acts as the last fallback only when enabled.
The AsterDrive built-in processor does not need extension bindings. You can disable it completely; once disabled, it no longer participates in thumbnail processing.
media_processing_editor_processor_comman: Executable name or absolute path used when running this CLI processor. Only enable it when this command is available on the server.
media_processing_editor_rule_extensions_: Comma-separated suffixes like `heic, heif`. Leave empty to match any supported file.
media_processing_error_parse: Media processing config must be valid JSON.
media_processing_error_version_mismatch: Media processing config version must be {{version}}.
media_processing_error_no_enabled_proces: Enable at least one media processor.
